subject: Stop winging your AI prompts

From our sister site, roadmap.sh

Data Engineer Roadmap: Master the Data Stack

Want to master the modern data stack? From Python and SQL to advanced orchestration, this Data Engineer roadmap identifies the exact skills needed to build scalable data pipelines.

  • Build Your Core: Master the essentials of Python, SQL, and data modeling to handle massive datasets with ease.

  • Scale Infrastructure: Learn to manage cloud warehouses like Snowflake and BigQuery alongside orchestration tools like Airflow.

  • Process in Real-Time: Advance into stream processing with Kafka and Spark to turn raw data into instant, actionable insights.
Explore the Roadmap

Go deeper than the headlines

Deep Dives

 
Machine Learning

Lasso Regression: Why the Solution Lives on a Diamond

In my recent blog post on linear regression, we solved a linear regression problem using the concept of vectors and projections instead of calculus. In this blog, we use those same concepts of vectors and projections to understand Lasso Regression.

by Nikhil Dasari

Read Article →

 
 
Data Science

Correlation vs. Causation: Measuring True Impact with Propensity Score Matching

A step-by-step guide to reducing selection bias in Python

by Gustavo Santos

Read Article →

 
 
AI

Context Payload Optimization for ICL-Based Tabular Foundation Models

We examine the inference‑time trade‑offs entailed by ICL-based tabular foundation models, outline practical strategies for optimizing context payloads, and demonstrate the use of KNN‑based context prefiltering.

by Chinmay Kakatkar

Read Article →

About this Newsletter

TDS Daily

Each day, we bring you a fresh mix of trending topics, practical tutorials, and thought-provoking reads from across the data-science landscape. Whether you're exploring machine learning, AI, or data engineering, you'll find something to spark new ideas and keep you ahead of the curve.

Data Engineer Roadmap: Master the Data Stack

Want to master the modern data stack? From Python and SQL to advanced orchestration, this Data Engineer roadmap identifies the exact skills needed to build scalable data pipelines.

-

Build Your Core: Master the essentials of Python, SQL, and data modeling to handle massive datasets with ease.

-

Scale Infrastructure: Learn to manage cloud warehouses like Snowflake and BigQuery alongside orchestration tools like Airflow.

- Process in Real-Time: Advance into stream processing with Kafka and Spark to turn raw data into instant, actionable insights.

TDS Daily

Each day, we bring you a fresh mix of trending topics, practical tutorials, and thought-provoking reads from across the data-science landscape. Whether you're exploring machine learning, AI, or data engineering, you'll find something to spark new ideas and keep you ahead of the curve.
